_comment: Hook wiring reference. Copy these blocks into .claude/settings.json (or the project-level Claude Code settings) to activate the hooks. Each hook is independently togglable.

PostToolUse._note: Formats TS/TSX/JS/JSX after Claude edits them. Idempotent, safe.
Warns if a migration is added without a matching dev-seed. Soft guard — does not block.

PreToolUse._note: Blocks commits with TypeScript errors. Can also be wired as .git/hooks/pre-commit directly.
